---
name: Review Feature
description: "Run a production-grade feature review in recommendme-app using the Feature Review agent."
argument-hint: "Feature scope, branch/commit range, changed files, and risk focus areas."
agent: "Feature Review"
---
Perform a production-grade feature review using the `Feature Review` custom agent workflow.

Use the user-provided arguments as the review scope and context, including:
- Feature scope
- Branch or commit range
- Changed files
- Risk focus areas

Follow the agent's full review protocol and return the result in the required 10-section output format.
